$comment: Formal residual classification taxonomy for canon extraction gaps.

classes.name: docling_issue
classes.description: Parser or layout failure — text exists in the OSB PDF but the verse boundary was not emitted by Docling.
predicted_books: all — any chapter-final verse or layout anomaly

classes.name: structural_fused
classes.description: Enumeration or list text where verse numbers are inline within a single TextItem and not split by the parser.

classes.name: osb_source_absent
classes.description: Verse absent from all available OSB source witnesses. Present only in upstream Greek or English witnesses. No substitute text inserted — canon artifact reflects OSB as-published.
examples: GEN.25:34 (absent from electronic PDF and verification scan)

classes.name: poetic_block
classes.description: Poetry or song section where verse boundaries are lost in justified column layout.

classes.name: dropcap_ocr
classes.description: Decorative initial letter at chapter start missed by Docling OCR, causing malformed first word.
predicted_books: all — any chapter with decorative initials
